# Do Stuff & Have Fun

Do Stuff & Have Fun is a kid-friendly video hub for playful YouTube channels, challenges, Shorts, crafts, experiments, and creative things to do when bored.

Primary website: https://dostuffandhavefun.com/

Important pages:

- https://dostuffandhavefun.com/
- https://dostuffandhavefun.com/videos/
- https://dostuffandhavefun.com/games/pong/
- https://dostuffandhavefun.com/games/spark-catcher/
- https://dostuffandhavefun.com/topics/things-to-do-when-bored/
- https://dostuffandhavefun.com/topics/safe-funny-challenges/
- https://dostuffandhavefun.com/topics/crafts-and-experiments/

The site is designed to connect real YouTube channels through `src/data/youtube.config.js`, fetch new videos with `npm run youtube:update`, and build crawlable pages for videos and topic hubs.

Audience:

- Kids looking for fun, safe, energetic videos.
- Parents looking for family-friendly video ideas.
- Search and answer engines trying to understand the site’s topics.

Content style:

- Playful, bright, parent-safe, and specific.
- No generic filler.
- No unsafe challenge framing.
